title: [Apache Flink 1.10.1 Released](</2020/05/12/apache-flink-1.10.1-released/>)

#  Apache Flink 1.10.1 Released
May 12, 2020 - Yu Li (@LiyuApache)
The Apache Flink community released the first bugfix version of the Apache Flink 1.10 series.
This release includes 158 fixes and minor improvements for Flink 1.10.0. The li…
